sizing_rule.note: Reduce position size to 75% during 10-25% drawdowns and 50% during drawdowns exceeding 25%. Base sizing assumes 1.0x standard position when no drawdown is present. Trade acceptance rate of 85% indicates psychological factor monitoring.

source_rule_text: A trader should take high-probability trades when they occur, because skipping trades due to psychological discouragement reduces realized opportunity and annual returns.
